result.evidence_summary: No evidence of a 'Furano Ski Marathon' cross-country ski race was found in the search results. The search results extensively document Furano Ski Resort's alpine skiing operations, events (including the Furanon Trial Race and Pond Skimming Race), and facilities, but contain no mention of any cross-country ski marathon event. The resort is exclusively an alpine skiing destination with no cross-country skiing infrastructure mentioned.
